claude-code-bridge: installing
  shell: bash (HOME/.bashrc)
  providers: deepseek openai gemini
  install dir: HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge

  COPY REPO_DIR/templates/litellm.base.yaml -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/templates/litellm.base.yaml
  COPY REPO_DIR/templates/proxy_handler.py -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/templates/proxy_handler.py
  COPY REPO_DIR/templates/shell-functions.zsh -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/templates/shell-functions.zsh
  COPY REPO_DIR/templates/shell-functions.bash -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/templates/shell-functions.bash
  [ok] Copied shell function templates
  COPY REPO_DIR/providers/deepseek.yaml -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/providers/deepseek.yaml
  COPY REPO_DIR/providers/openai.yaml -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/providers/openai.yaml
  COPY REPO_DIR/providers/gemini.yaml -> HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/providers/gemini.yaml
  [ok] Copied provider configs: deepseek openai gemini
  COPY REPO_DIR/templates/hooks/morph-session -> HOME/.claude/hooks/morph-session
  [ok] Installed SessionStart hook
  ADD marker block to HOME/.bashrc (source HOME/.config/claude-code-bridge/templates/shell-functions.bash)
  [ok] Added shell functions to HOME/.bashrc

claude-code-bridge: installed successfully.

Next steps:
  1. Restart your shell (or run: source HOME/.bashrc)
  2. Set your API key:
     export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY="your-key"
     export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key"
     export GEMINI_API_KEY="your-key"
  3. Launch Claude Code:
     claude-deepseek
     claude-openai
     claude-gemini
